projects.title: AgentEscrow
projects.description: Cross-chain payment infrastructure with AI agent integration. Agents escrow, validate, and release payments automatically. Live on Avalanche & Base with 6+ production positions.

projects.title: AAE Defi Milestones
projects.description: Automated DeFi milestone tracking and position rebalancing across Avalanche, Base, and Solana. Auto-tracking LP positions, DCA scheduling, fee analytics, and dynamic milestone-based adjustments. Managing ~$1K+ in active positions.

projects.title: Multi-Agent Voice Integration
projects.description: Four-agent voice system (Gentech, YoYo, DMOB, Desmond) with daily automated briefings. End-to-end TTS pipeline with dialogue generation, voice selection, and audio mixing. Quota active, production-ready.

projects.title: Solana Frontier
projects.description: 4-program Anchor workspace for Solana Frontier hackathon (due May 11). AgentRegistry with World ID CPI, JobEscrow with PDA vaults + 8-state lifecycle, Reputation NFTs, and DisputeResolver.

projects.title: Kite AI Brain Layer
projects.description: Planning phase: Yield oracle integration (Ranger, Pangolin, Benqi) + strategy evaluator for LP range shapes. Depends on Solana Frontier bandwidth freeing up. Target delivery: May 17.

projects.title: Personal Finance Agent
projects.description: Bill reminders, debt consolidation optimizer, crypto-yield routing for idle capital. Voice-first assistant with Telegram notifications. Prototype stage using local LLM (llama3:8b).

projects.title: Let's FG Travel Agent
projects.description: Voice-first travel planning agent. Natural language flight/hotel search, price tracking, and booking automation via Pipecat and Maps APIs.

projects.title: Hermes Kanban
projects.description: TUI-based kanban board for autonomous agent task management. Integrated with Hermes agent orchestration for real-time task tracking and handoffs.

projects.title: Birdeye BIP
projects.description: On-chain market data adapter for Birdeye ecosystem. Real-time price feeds, order book data, and volume metrics for agent trading strategies.

projects.title: Tech Payment Router
projects.description: Ethereum payment router with x402 protocol support. Enables automated recurring payments, subscription billing, and micro-transaction routing.
